titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine Department of Communications records24-10-3338
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Laura Finkel

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine Department of Communications records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. College of Veterinary Medicine. Department of Communications

did.physdesc: Videocassettes, audio cassettes, press releases, tear sheets, publications, photographs, and ephemera.
did.abstract: Audiovisual materials produced and collected by the Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine Department of Communications, primarily related to .

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Videocassettes, audio cassettes, press releases, tear sheets, publications, slides, photographs, and ephemera from the Communications Department of the Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine, dating from ca. 1970-2002.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Audio and Video Cassettes Boxes: 1, 7 -11

Several audio and video cassettes of varying formats. Most of the video cassettes are copies of stories run on television news or science programs featuring Cornell veterinarians. Some include local news coverage of college events. The audio tapes include recordings of college events as well as a number of American Association for the Advancement of Science program tapes. There are also 8 video tapes of interviews with several former deans of the college and then-president Hunter Rawlings which were recorded in 2000 for a promotional "Millennium" video that was never completed.
Series II. Publicity Subject Files Boxes: 2 and 6
Press releases, tear sheets (news clippings), and miscellaneous publications containing references to college people, events and issues.
Series III. Photographs by Subject Boxes: 2 - 4 and 9
Photographs, mostly from University Photography, arranged by subject; contains some slides.
Series IV. Photographs by Department Boxes: 5 and 6
Negatives, contact sheets and some photos. Mostly portraits of faculty and staff arranged by department.
2 medallions created for the college centennial in 1994.

odd.head: General
odd.p: See also the Veterinary College of Medicine Biomedical Communications Dept. records, #24-14-3352 and the Veterinary College of Medicine Subject Files and Photographs, #24-4-3385.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine Department of Communications records #24-10-3338. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Communications Department of the Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine is responsible for publicity and external relations for the college. The college was known as the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine until the late 1980s.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access.

controlaccess.subject: Veterinary medicine -- Study and teaching.
